landing.badge: Your digital advisor for government services
landing.heroSubtitle: Mysorat is at your service — go ahead, how can I help? Describe your request and we'll diagnose your need, request the documents, and follow through until it's done.
landing.stat1Desc: Text, voice, or photo — your way
landing.feature1Desc: Describe your request by voice, text, or photo, and Mysorat diagnoses your need instantly.
landing.feature2Desc: No technical jargon, just direct guidance until the service is done.
landing.feature3Desc: Know exactly where your transaction stands and how much time is left.
landing.feature4Desc: If automation gets stuck, a specialist expert takes over manually.
landing.aiHeading: A unique conversation experience to get things done
landing.aiDesc: No complex forms to fill, no searching scattered websites — just describe your request your way, and Mysorat handles the diagnosis and follow-up.
landing.aiFeature1: Natural understanding of Arabic and its local dialects
landing.aiFeature2: Automatic document image analysis via AI
landing.aiFeature3: Instant diagnosis of the required service, no guessing

support.title: Contact Support Team
support.subtitle: Our human team replies directly to your questions, behind the AI.
support.messagePlaceholder: Write your message to the support team...

trust.title: Trust & Security
trust.subtitle: We handle sensitive government and personal data, and this is what we actually do to protect it.
trust.noteBody: Mysorat is a digital advisor that makes it easier for you to handle government services and follows up on your behalf — it is not an official government entity. We explain your process steps and fees with full transparency, and if automation gets stuck, a specialist expert completes it manually until it's done.

passwordEncryption.title: Password Encryption
passwordEncryption.desc: Your password is never stored as plain text — it's encrypted with the one-way bcrypt algorithm, so no one (not even our team) can recover it.

twoFactorOptional.title: Optional Two-Factor Verification
twoFactorOptional.desc: You can enable an extra layer of protection on your account via an authenticator app (like Google Authenticator) from the Settings page.

dataIsolation.title: Per-User Data Isolation
dataIsolation.desc: No customer can access another customer's transactions or documents under any circumstances — this is enforced at the server level for every request, not just in the interface.

secureDocumentStorage.title: Secure Document Storage
secureDocumentStorage.desc: Uploaded documents are stored in encrypted cloud storage, and are only accessible via temporary links valid for a few minutes upon request.

fullAuditLog.title: Complete Audit Log
fullAuditLog.desc: Every action that touches your transaction (payment, document upload, expert transfer) is logged with timestamp and source, and can be reviewed when needed.

loginProtection.title: Protection Against Repeated Login Attempts
loginProtection.desc: Login and password reset attempts are automatically rate-limited to prevent any automated intrusion attempt.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL).

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: This policy explains how Mysorat collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our website and app, in compliance with the Personal Data Protection Law issued by the Saudi Data & AI Authority (SDAIA). By using the platform, you agree to the practices described here.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect basic account data (name, email, phone number), identity data when required for a specific service (such as a national ID number), documents you upload to complete your transactions, the content of your conversations with the AI assistant (text, transcribed voice messages, images), and limited technical data such as IP address and device type for security purposes.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing and Legal Basis
purpose.body: We process your data to deliver the service you requested, to verify the validity of documents, to prevent fraud and protect your account, to contact you about your transactions via email, SMS, or WhatsApp if you've enabled it, and to comply with our legal obligations.

aiUsage.title: Use of Artificial Intelligence
aiUsage.body: Mysorat uses Anthropic's Claude model to analyze your messages and documents and to provide guidance and an initial validity check. This data is sent to Anthropic solely for processing purposes and is not used to train their models, under our data processing agreement with them.

thirdParties.title: Sharing Data with Third Parties
thirdParties.body: We do not sell your data to anyone. We share limited data with trusted service providers only to the extent needed to operate the platform: Anthropic for AI processing, Twilio for SMS and WhatsApp messaging, our cloud storage provider to store your uploaded documents encrypted, and Sentry for technical error monitoring without sensitive data. Each of these parties is bound by a data processing agreement requiring confidentiality and prohibiting any other use.

retention.title: Data Retention Period
retention.body: We retain your transaction and document data for as long as your account is active and for the period required by law afterward, after which it is securely deleted or anonymized. You may request deletion of your data at any time as described below.

rights.title: Your Rights Over Your Data
rights.body: Under the Personal Data Protection Law, you have the right to access your data, request correction, request deletion, object to processing, and withdraw your consent at any time. To exercise any of these rights, contact us via the email below. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Saudi Data & AI Authority (SDAIA) if you believe our processing of your data violates the law.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: We apply technical and organizational measures to protect your data, detailed on our Trust & Security page, including password encryption, per-user data isolation, and encrypted document storage.

transfer.title: International Data Transfer
transfer.body: Some of the service providers we work with may process data on servers located outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. In such cases, we ensure adequate safeguards are in place to protect your data in line with the requirements of the Personal Data Protection Law.

cookies.title: Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.body: We use your browser's local storage only to keep your login session and language preference, and we do not use third-party advertising trackers.

children.title: Children's Data
children.body: The platform is intended for adults capable of entering into contracts under the law, and we do not knowingly collect data from minors without guardian consent.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time to keep pace with regulatory or operational changes, and we will publish any material update on this page.

contact.title: Privacy Contact
contact.body: For any inquiry or request regarding your personal data, email us at support@mysorat.sa.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the Mysorat platform.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By using the Mysorat platform or creating an account on it, you acknowledge your agreement to these terms in full. If you do not agree to any part of them, please do not use the platform.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.body: Mysorat is a smart digital advisor that helps you understand and follow up on Saudi government service procedures on your behalf, by automating the steps that can be automated or transferring them to a specialist when needed.

importantDisclaimer.title: Important Notice
importantDisclaimer.body: Mysorat is not an official government entity and is not affiliated with any government body, and it has no authority to submit your request or pay government fees on your behalf on official systems. Our role is to make the procedure easier to understand and follow up on, and to remind you of its steps — you may still need to complete some steps directly on the official government portal.

eligibility.title: Eligibility and Data Accuracy
eligibility.body: Your registered data must be accurate and up to date, and you are solely responsible for the confidentiality of your account credentials and for any activity carried out through it.

fees.title: Fees
fees.body: Mysorat's fee is solely the charge for follow-up and AI assistance, shown transparently before payment for each transaction. Any estimated government fee shown is for your information only and is not collected by us — it is paid directly on the official government portal when you complete that step.

cancellation.title: Cancelling Transactions
cancellation.body: You may cancel any transaction that hasn't been completed yet from its detail page. Cancelling through Mysorat only stops our follow-up on the procedure, and does not cancel any request or payment already made directly with a government entity.

prohibitedUse.title: Prohibited Use
prohibitedUse.body: You may not use the platform for any unlawful purpose, submit forged documents or data, attempt unauthorized access to other accounts or systems, or misuse the AI assistant in a way that contradicts its intended purpose.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: All rights related to the platform's design, content, and trademark are owned by Mysorat, and may not be copied or reused without prior written permission.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: We make reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of information and follow-up, but we do not guarantee the service will be free of errors or delays caused by government or technical factors beyond our control, and we are not responsible for any final government decision regarding your request.

termination.title: Account Termination
termination.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these terms, and you may close your account at any time by contacting us.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and its courts have exclusive jurisdiction over any dispute arising from them.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time, and your continued use of the platform after any update is published constitutes acceptance of it.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any inquiry regarding these terms, email us at support@mysorat.sa.
